stemHtml: Per ICAO Annex 14, the aerodrome reference code provides a simple method for matching aerodrome characteristics to the aircraft that will use the aerodrome. It is based on the…

options.a: Aeroplane reference field length and wingspan.
options.b: Number of runways and aeroplane reference field length.
options.c: Runway width and maximum permitted wingspan.
options.d: Runway length and minimum taxiway width.
